ip_outcome_note: Scryfall type_line is 'Legendary Planeswalker — Kiora', confirming the depicted figure is the Zendikari merfolk planeswalker Kiora. Kiora is an internal Wizards-original character (no external-IP risk), so frontmatter ip_verified flipped to true and no IP callout block is required.

trivia_bullets.text: Part of War of the Spark's 36-planeswalker set (May 2019) — the first set to print uncommon planeswalkers as a designed cycle, with 3 mythic, 13 rare, and 20 uncommon walkers all depicting figures answering Bolas's summons to Ravnica [MTG Wiki: War of the Spark].
sources: MTG Wiki: War of the Spark

trivia_bullets.text: Kiora is one of the 20 uncommon planeswalkers from WAR. The uncommon-walker design pattern Mark Rosewater described in 'Waging War of the Spark, Part 1' gives each uncommon walker exactly one ability — a static/triggered effect plus a single loyalty ability — so they slot into Limited without breaking the format; Kiora's static-trigger (card draw on power-4+ creature ETB) plus a single -1 (untap a permanent) follows that template exactly [Wizards: 'Waging War of the Spark, Part 1', Mark Rosewater, 2019-04-01].
sources: Wizards: Waging War of the Spark Part 1

trivia_bullets.text: Hybrid mana cost {2}{G/U} — a Simic-coded hybrid that lets her run in mono-blue or mono-green decks. The G/U hybrid signals Kiora's continued ties to Simic-style ocean/leviathan magic established on her earlier Born of the Gods and Battle for Zendikar printings [Scryfall]. Artist: Jaime Jones [Scryfall].

Mechanically considered a strong uncommon walker for the cycle: 7 starting loyalty (high for the slot) and a -1 cost on her only activated ability means she's hard to kill and can untap repeatedly. EDHREC rank ~2258. Community write-ups frame her as an under-discussed role-player whose untap effect isn't restricted to lands — it untaps any permanent, enabling combos with tap-activated creatures and artifacts [MTGGoldfish: 'The Beauty of Uncommon Planeswalkers'; SCG: 'Kickin' It With Kiora, Behemoth Beckoner'].
sources: MTGGoldfish: The Beauty of Uncommon Planeswalkers
Star City Games: Kickin' It With Kiora, Behemoth Beckoner

trivia_bullets.text: Kiora's in-world context: a merfolk planeswalker born on Zendikar who venerates leviathans, krakens, and the deep sea, and wields a bident stolen from the god Thassa [MTG Wiki: Kiora]. The art shows her atop a surfacing leviathan in the middle of the Ravnica conflict, consistent with WAR's framing of every planeswalker arriving on Ravnica to face Bolas.
